name: site-sense
description: Give your AI coding CLI eyes into web portals

scripts.build:ext: ENTRY=background vite build -c extension/vite.config.ts && ENTRY=content vite build -c extension/vite.config.ts && ENTRY=inject vite build -c extension/vite.config.ts && ENTRY=popup vite build -c extension/vite.config.ts && npm run copy:ext-static
scripts.copy:ext-static: cp extension/manifest.json dist/extension/ && cp extension/src/popup/index.html dist/extension/popup.html && cp -r extension/icons dist/extension/
